user.title: Add vehicle
user.description: First choose the vehicle name and license plate type.

plate.title: License plate
plate.description: Enter the license plate data. Spaces are preserved for the card. H/E is offered only for non-green plates. Season start and end are validated together.

due.title: Inspection due date
due.description: Enter the next inspection due date and interval.

season_end.title: Season end
season_end.description: Only legally valid season ends are offered: at least 2 and at most 11 months.

error.invalid_vehicle_digit: The vehicle-specific change-plate part must be exactly one digit.
error.invalid_season_range: A seasonal license plate must cover at least 2 months and at most 11 months.
